ige_cluster_insight: Six-domain four-property IGE cluster confirmed (C108). Domains: formal mathematics (DC#1), precision metrology (DC#2), geochemistry (DC#4), molecular biology (DC#5), analytical chemistry (DC#6), structural biology (DC#7). Each exhibits: (1) Near-zero TCI at measurement step, (2) BIPM-analog institution, (3) IGE-MCCF structure from physically orthogonal mechanisms, (4) Discrepancy visibility registry. Pattern spans formal logic, quantum atomic physics, nuclear geochemistry, molecular biology, analytical chemistry, structural biology. Domain generality robustly established; six-domain span rules out sampling artifact explanations.
wwpdb_analog_insight: wwPDB (worldwide Protein Data Bank) is the most explicitly BIPM-structured institution in the confirmed DC series. Combines: mandatory deposition (enforced by journal policy), automated apparatus-computed validation for every deposit, international consortium governance (US/Europe/Japan/China), permanent accession codes. 'wwPDB for AI circuits' would require: mandatory deposition + circuit-level interpretability analysis + apparatus-computed validation for any published capability claim. Cryo-EM precedent: early high OA-DoF → near-zero OA-DoF via FSC + mandatory EMDB deposition — a trajectory AI interpretability could follow toward DC#3 full.
tms_analog_insight: TMS (tetramethylsilane) as universal chemical shift reference (IUPAC δ=0) is the clearest calibration standard template for DC#3. Combined with the wwPDB institutional template, DC#3 full requires: a universal circuit-level reference computation (TMS analog) + mandatory deposition infrastructure (wwPDB analog) + apparatus-computed validation metrics (FSC analog).

P3: BIPM analog — mandatory discrepancy registry reveals AI evaluation tensions within 12 months
P4: Absence-of-tension diagnostic — near-agreement in AI benchmarking is evidence of TCI, not accuracy
milestone_approaching: D4 streak 99 — C109 will mark D4 streak 100 if maintained. C109 options: network spine update (incorporate DC#7); DC#3 full gap analysis (R1 + R3 missing requirements); P1 operationalization; wwPDB-analog architecture proposal for AI circuits.
